title: Organization
description: Structural sub-brand belonging to a Tenant. Answers 'which brand does this row belong to?' Orthogonal to Region; meets at Branch. Carries `tenant_id` only — NEVER `application_id` (cascades through tenants), NEVER `region_id` (orthogonal axis), NEVER `scope_node_id` (Organization is a scope-node entity, not a scope consumer). Nesting via self-referential `parent_id` + materialised `tree_path` for O(1) descendant lookup. Exactly one `is_default=true` per tenant, seeded on TenantProvisioned.

x-eloquent.relations_note: `parent()` belongsTo Organization (self) via parent_id. `children()` hasMany Organization (self) via parent_id. `descendants()` + `ancestors()` are computed via HasOrganizationHierarchy trait — not real Eloquent relations, but returned as EloquentBuilder for downstream ->with()/->where() composition. `tenant()` belongsTo Tenant.

x-database.description: One first-party table. Composite scoping via `tenant_id` only — no application_id column (cascades), no region_id column (orthogonal). tree_path is a materialised path with sentinel wraps (`.<a>.<b>.<c>.`) supporting BTREE-indexed LIKE prefix scans for O(1) descendant queries.

tenant_id.description: Every Organization belongs to a Tenant. Cascade delete on TenantErased.

parent_id.description: Self-referential FK. Null = root node. Same-tenant enforced by rule + observer (defense-in-depth beyond the FK).

name.description: Display name. Not unique — two orgs may share a name (different slugs).

slug.description: URL-safe identifier. Unique per (tenant_id, slug). Regex `^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*[a-z0-9]$`. Reserved slugs refused (see rules.json).

short_name.description: Compact form for tight UI slots. `Elite` for `Elite Sports Academy`.

description.description: Long-form description. Writes gated by organization_branding entitlement.

category.description: Enum: sports_academy / sports_center / school / gym / federation / club / mixed. May be more specific than the tenant's business_type.

status.description: Enum: active / paused / archived. Same semantics as region.

is_default.description: Exactly one is_default=true per tenant. Auto-demote on flip. Cannot be deleted / archived / paused.

sort_order.description: Ascending sort in UI picker. Defaults to 100 so seeded rows (sort_order=0) sort first.

logo_url.description: URL to a storage::File. Writes gated by organization_branding entitlement.

primary_color.description: Hex `#RRGGBB`. Writes gated by organization_branding entitlement.

support_email.description: Org-level customer support address. Distinct from the tenant's DPO/billing contacts on TenantContact.

contact_person_name.description: Named contact at the Organization. PII-adjacent (classified `internal` — see data-classes.json).

established_date.description: When the Organization was founded (not when the row was created). Optional; used by public 'About Us' surfaces.

tree_path.description: Materialised path: `.<root_id>.<parent_id>.<self_id>.`. Sentinel-wrapped so LIKE '.a.' matches self and LIKE '.a.%' matches descendants. Recomputed by OrganizationObserver on parent_id change + by RebuildTreePathsJob for descendants.

tree_depth.description: 0 = root; 1 = child of root; etc. Derived from tree_path (count splits - 2 to account for sentinels).

notes.description: Ops-only notes. Hidden from tenant-plane responses.

indexes.name: organizations_tenant_slug_unique
indexes.description: One live slug per tenant. Soft-deleted rows do not collide.

indexes.name: organizations_tenant_default_unique
indexes.predicate: is_default = true AND deleted_at IS NULL
indexes.description: Enforces the exactly-one-default invariant at the DB level. Belt-and-braces on top of the observer's auto-demote logic.

indexes.name: organizations_tenant_parent_idx
indexes.description: Fast lookup of direct children per tenant.

indexes.name: organizations_tree_path_idx
indexes.description: BTREE index supports LIKE prefix scans for descendant lookups. text_pattern_ops opclass to guarantee prefix-friendly ordering under any Postgres locale.

indexes.name: organizations_tenant_depth_idx
indexes.description: Aggregation queries: how many roots? how deep is the deepest chain?

parent_id.description: Null = root node. Non-null must match the same tenant_id.

tree_path.description: Sentinel-wrapped materialised path. Enforced format: leading dot, one or more `org_<ulid>.` chunks.

display_label.description: Computed. `<name> (<short_name>)` when short_name is set, else `<name>`.

descendant_count.description: Computed via tree_path prefix scan. Included by default in list responses; suppressed on show responses unless `?include=descendant_count`.

accepts: slug (case-insensitive, matches slug column within the resolved tenant)

invariants: COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_default=true) = 1 per tenant_id (enforced by unique index + observer + reconciler).
parent_id.tenant_id = tenant_id when parent_id IS NOT NULL (enforced by rule + observer).
tree_path prefix chain matches parent_id chain (enforced by observer + rebuilt by RebuildTreePathsJob after each parent_id change).
tree_depth = count(tree_path splits) - 2 (accounts for the sentinel dots).
No cycles: for any pair (a, b), NOT (a.tree_path startsWith b.tree_path AND b.tree_path startsWith a.tree_path).
